commands.name: add-module
commands.description: Add a multi-package module to a solution by finding all packages of the module, finding related projects in the solution and adding each package to the corresponding project in the solution.

commands.name: add-package
commands.description: Add a new ROCKET package to a project by adding related NuGet package dependencies and [DependsOn(...)] attributes.

commands.name: build
commands.description: Builds a dotnet repository and dependent repositories or a solution.

commands.name: bundle
commands.description: Bundles all third party styles and scripts required by modules and updates index.html file.

commands.name: create-migration-and-run-migrator
commands.description:
To get a detailed help for a command:
rocket help <command>
See the documentation for more info: https://docs.rocket.io/en/rocket/latest/CLI

commands.name: generate-proxy
commands.description: Generates Angular service proxies and DTOs to consume HTTP APIs.

commands.name: get-source
commands.description: Download the source code of the specified module.

commands.name: help
commands.description: Show command line help. Write ` rocket help <command> `

commands.name: new
commands.description: Generate a new solution based on the ROCKET startup templates.

commands.name: remove-proxy
commands.description: Generates Angular service proxies and DTOs to consume HTTP APIs.

commands.name: suite
commands.description: Install, update, remove or start ROCKET Suite. See https://commercial.rocket.io/tools/suite.

commands.name: switch-to-nightly
commands.description: Switches packages to nightly preview ROCKET version.

commands.name: switch-to-preview
commands.description: Switches packages to preview ROCKET version.

commands.name: switch-to-stable
commands.description: Switches packages to stable ROCKET version from preview version.

commands.name: translate
commands.description: Mainly used to translate ROCKET's resources (JSON files) easier.

commands.name: update
commands.description: Update all ROCKET related NuGet packages and NPM packages in a solution or project to the latest version.
